lessons.name: Unit 1: Local Community
lessons.description: Learn about local community: community helpers, traditional handicrafts, question words + to-infinitive, and phrasal verbs.

sub_lessons.name: Getting Started
sub_lessons.description: Khởi động - Làm quen với chủ đề Local Community qua hội thoại và từ vựng.

sections.heading: 1. Listen and Read
sections.content:
Dialogue:

Ann: Hi, Mi. Long time no see. How're you doing?

Mi: I'm fine, thanks. By the way, we moved to a new house in a suburb last month.

Ann: Oh, that's why I haven't seen you in the Reading Club very often.

Mi: Yes. We're still busy moving in, you know.

Ann: How's your new neighbourhood?

Mi: It's much bigger than our old one. The streets are wider, and there are fewer people.

Ann: What about the facilities?

Mi: It has all the things we need: shopping malls, parks, and hospitals. And there's a craft village near our house.

Ann: Great! How're your new neighbours?

Mi: They're nice. Last Sunday when I was looking for the way to the bus station, a lady came and showed me the way. I think we will get on with them.

Ann: That reminds me of the time our family moved to Viet Nam. We didn't know where to buy stuff for our house, and the new neighbours in the community gave us useful advice. I guess you like your new place.

Mi: Sure. I really love where I live now.

sections.heading: 2. Vocabulary from the dialogue
sections.content:
Word / PhraseMeaning
suburbvùng ngoại ô
facilitiescơ sở vật chất, tiện ích
craft villagelàng nghề thủ công
get on withhòa thuận với ai
remind sb ofgợi cho ai nhớ về

sections.heading: 3. Matching
sections.content:
Match the words with their definitions:

WordDefinition
1. suburba. the people living in a particular area
2. facilitiesb. to make sb remember sth
3. communityc. to have a good relationship with sb
4. get on withd. an area outside the centre of the city
5. remind sb ofe. buildings and services provided for a purpose

Answers: 1-d, 2-e, 3-a, 4-c, 5-b

sections.heading: 4. Complete the sentences
sections.content:
Fill in each blank with a word or phrase from the matching exercise:

  1. They don't live in the city centre but in a _____ of Ha Noi. → suburb
  2. I love our new neighbourhood because we _____ the people here. → get on with
  3. There are enough sports _____ for people of all ages in our local park. → facilities
  4. Souvenirs _____ people _____ a place, an occasion, or a holiday. → remind of
  5. The local _____ encourages us to protect the environment and keep our neighbourhood clean. → community

sections.heading: 5. THIS UNIT INCLUDES
sections.content:
• Vocabulary: Community helpers, Traditional handicrafts
  • Grammar: Question words before to-infinitives, Phrasal verbs
  • Skills: Reading about special products in some areas, Giving a short presentation about a speciality, Listening about a community helper, Writing a paragraph about a community helper

exercises.question: Mi's family moved to a new house in a ____ last month.
exercises.explanation: Mi said: 'we moved to a new house in a suburb last month.'

exercises.question: What does Mi say about her new neighbourhood?
options: It's smaller than the old one.
exercises.explanation: Mi said: 'The streets are wider, and there are fewer people.'

exercises.question: What is near Mi's new house?
exercises.explanation: Mi said: 'And there's a craft village near our house.'

exercises.question: A _____ is an area outside the centre of a city.
exercises.explanation: suburb = vùng ngoại ô

exercises.question: The phrase 'get on with' means _____.
options: to have a good relationship with someone
exercises.explanation: get on with = hòa thuận với ai

sub_lessons.name: A Closer Look 1
sub_lessons.description: Nhìn sâu 1 - Từ vựng về community helpers, traditional handicrafts và phát âm trọng âm.

sections.heading: 1. Vocabulary: Community Helpers
sections.content:
WordMeaningJob
garbage collectorngười thu gom ráccollects rubbish
firefighterlính cứu hỏaputs out fires
police officercảnh sátkeeps law and order
nursey tátakes care of patients
postmanngười đưa thưdelivers letters
tradespersonthợ thủ côngmakes or sells goods
artisannghệ nhânmakes traditional products

sections.heading: 2. Traditional Handicrafts
sections.content:
CraftVietnameseDescription
potteryđồ gốmobjects made out of clay
weavingdệt vảimaking fabric by crossing threads
embroiderythêudecorating fabric with needle and thread
wood carvingchạm khắc gỗcarving designs on wood
silk-makinglàm lụaproducing silk fabric
conical hat makinglàm nón lámaking traditional Vietnamese hats
incense makinglàm hươngproducing incense sticks

sections.heading: 3. Pronunciation: Word Stress
sections.content:
Quy tắc: Các từ kết thúc bằng -tion, -ic, -ity, -ial, -ian thường có trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết liền trước hậu tố.

WordStress
communitycomMUnity
traditiontraDItion
facilityfaCILity
artisanARtisan
handicraftHANdicraft

exercises.question: A _____ puts out fires and helps people in emergencies.
exercises.explanation: firefighter = lính cứu hỏa, dập lửa và giúp đỡ người trong trường hợp khẩn cấp.

exercises.question: A _____ keeps law and order in the community.
exercises.explanation: police officer = cảnh sát, giữ gìn trật tự pháp luật.

exercises.question: _____ are objects made out of clay.
exercises.explanation: Pottery = đồ gốm, được làm từ đất sét.

exercises.question: The word 'community' has stress on which syllable?
exercises.explanation: community → comMUnity, trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai.

exercises.question: Making fabric by crossing threads is called _____.
exercises.explanation: Weaving = dệt vải, làm vải bằng cách đan chéo các sợi chỉ.

exercises.question: The word 'tradition' has stress on which syllable?
exercises.explanation: tradition → traDItion, trọng âm rơi vào âm tiết thứ hai.

sub_lessons.name: A Closer Look 2
sub_lessons.description: Nhìn sâu 2 - Ngữ pháp: Question words + to-infinitive và Phrasal verbs.

sections.heading: 1. Question Words + to-infinitive
sections.content:
Cấu trúc: Wh-word + to-infinitive

Các từ để hỏi sử dụng được: what, where, when, how, who, which (không dùng why)

StructureMeaningExample
what to dolàm gìI don't know what to do.
where to gođi đâuShe asked me where to go.
when to startkhi nào bắt đầuTell me when to start.
how to usecách sử dụngHe showed me how to use it.
who to askhỏi aiI wonder who to ask.
which to choosechọn cái nàoI can't decide which to choose.

Vị trí: Sau các động từ: know, understand, decide, wonder, ask, tell, show, learn, remember, forget, explain, find out

sections.heading: 2. Phrasal Verbs (Cụm động từ)
sections.content:
Phrasal VerbMeaningExample
look afterchăm sócShe looks after her elderly parents.
look fortìm kiếmI'm looking for my keys.
look forward tomong đợiI look forward to hearing from you.
turn upxuất hiện; đếnShe turned up late.
turn downtừ chối; giảm âm lượngHe turned down the offer.
get on withhòa thuận vớiI get on with my neighbours.
get overvượt quaShe got over her illness.
carry outthực hiệnThey carried out a survey.
find outtìm ra, khám pháI need to find out the truth.
set upthành lậpThey set up a new business.
hand downtruyền lạiSkills are handed down.
cut down oncắt giảmCut down on sugar.

problemTypes.name: Question Words + to-infinitive
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Xác định từ để hỏi phù hợp (what, where, when, how, who, which)
  • Thêm to + V (nguyên mẫu)
  • Không dùng why
  • Đặt sau các động từ như: know, tell, show, learn, decide...

examples.question: Tell me ______ (when / start).
examples.explanation: when + to + start = khi nào bắt đầu

problemTypes.name: Phrasal Verbs
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Học thuộc nghĩa của phrasal verbs
  • Chọn phrasal verb phù hợp với ngữ cảnh
  • Chú ý dạng chia động từ

exercises.question: I don't know ______ to do.
exercises.explanation: what to do = làm gì

exercises.question: She asked me ______ to go.
exercises.explanation: where to go = đi đâu

exercises.question: Tell me ______ to start.
exercises.explanation: when to start = khi nào bắt đầu

exercises.question: He showed me ______ to use it.
exercises.explanation: how to use = cách sử dụng

exercises.question: I wonder ______ to ask.
exercises.explanation: who to ask = hỏi ai

exercises.question: Can you help me ______ the truth? (tìm ra)
exercises.explanation: find out = tìm ra

exercises.question: She ______ her younger brother. (chăm sóc)
exercises.explanation: look after = chăm sóc

exercises.question: They ______ a new business. (thành lập)
exercises.explanation: set up = thành lập

exercises.question: I'm ______ my keys. (tìm kiếm)
exercises.explanation: look for = tìm kiếm

exercises.question: You should decide ______ to move to the new house.
exercises.explanation: when to move = khi nào chuyển đi

sub_lessons.name: Communication
sub_lessons.description: Giao tiếp - Everyday English: Seeking help and responding. Luyện nghe và nói về địa điểm yêu thích.

sections.heading: 1. Everyday English: Seeking help and responding
sections.content:
Seeking help (Nhờ giúp đỡ):

  • Do you mind + V-ing? — Bạn có phiền...? (Ex: Do you mind carrying this suitcase for me?)
  • Could you + V...? — Bạn có thể...? (Ex: Could you show me how to open this gate, please?)
  • Can you + V...? — Bạn có thể...?
  • Would you mind + V-ing? — Bạn có phiền...?

Responding (Đáp lại):

  • Not at all. — Không có gì.
  • Sure. — Chắc chắn rồi.
  • Of course. — Tất nhiên.
  • No problem. — Không vấn đề gì.
  • I'm afraid I can't. — Tôi e là tôi không thể. (từ chối lịch sự)

sections.heading: 2. Practice: Pair work
sections.content:
Situation 1: You want your friend to lend you her pen.

You: Do you mind lending me your pen?

Friend: Not at all. Here you are.

Situation 2: You want your neighbour to tell you the name of the new garbage collector.

You: Could you tell me the name of the new garbage collector, please?

Neighbour: Sure. His name is Mr. Nam.

Situation 3: You want to ask your neighbour where to buy the best fruits and vegetables.

You: Do you know where to buy the best fruits and vegetables?

Neighbour: The local market has the freshest ones.

sections.heading: 3. Listening: A place of interest
sections.content:
Listen to Binh and Mira talking about a place of interest in their community. Fill in each blank with no more than TWO words and/or a number.

PlacePlace of InterestDistanceFrequencyActivities
Binh (HCMC)Nguyen Hue Pedestrian Street(1) _____ kmEvery (2) _____Children: enjoying music, looking for (3) _____
Parents: looking around
Mira (Sydney)Sydney Opera House(4) _____ kmTwice a monthChildren: running up and down the stairs, (5) _____ seagulls
Parents: having (6) _____, talking

Answers: (1) 2, (2) Sunday, (3) souvenirs, (4) 5, (5) feeding, (6) coffee

sections.heading: 4. Speaking: My favourite place of interest
sections.content:
Work in pairs. Ask and answer about your favourite places of interest.

  • What is your favourite place of interest?
  • How far is it from your house?
  • How often do you go to that place?
  • What do you do there?

Example:

Lan's favourite place of interest is Tao Dan Park. It's only one kilometre from her house. She goes there every weekend. She enjoys jogging and reading books under the trees.

exercises.question: Which is the correct way to ask for help politely?
options: Do you mind carrying this suitcase for me?
I want you to carry this suitcase.
exercises.explanation: Do you mind + V-ing? là cách nhờ giúp đỡ lịch sự.

exercises.question: Which is a polite response when agreeing to help?
exercises.explanation: Not at all. là cách đáp lại lịch sự khi đồng ý giúp đỡ.

exercises.question: How far is Nguyen Hue Pedestrian Street from Binh's house?
exercises.explanation: Binh's place of interest is 2 km from his house.

exercises.question: How often does Mira go to Sydney Opera House?
exercises.explanation: Mira goes to Sydney Opera House twice a month.

sub_lessons.name: Skills 1
sub_lessons.description: Kỹ năng 1 - Đọc hiểu về sản phẩm đặc sản ở các vùng miền và nói về đặc sản địa phương.

sections.heading: 1. Reading: Special products in some areas
sections.content:
Pre-reading questions: What can you see in each picture?

Read the passage about traditional products from different regions of Viet Nam.

SPECIAL PRODUCTS IN SOME AREAS

Viet Nam has many traditional craft villages. Each village produces special products. For example, Bat Trang village in Ha Noi is famous for pottery. Artisans there make beautiful vases, bowls, and teacups from clay. The skills are handed down from generation to generation.

In the south, Ben Tre is known for coconut candy and handicrafts made from coconut leaves. Visitors can watch how to make coconut candy and enjoy its sweet flavour.

Ha Tay (now part of Ha Noi) is famous for silk weaving. Van Phuc silk village produces high-quality silk products. Many tourists come here to buy scarves, dresses, and ties.

In the central region, Hoi An is well-known for its tailor shops and lanterns. The lanterns are made with colourful silk and bamboo frames. They light up the ancient town every night.

sections.heading: 2. Comprehension Questions
sections.content:
1. What is Bat Trang village famous for? → Pottery
  2. What is Ben Tre known for? → Coconut candy and handicrafts made from coconut leaves
  3. Which village is famous for silk weaving? → Van Phuc silk village
  4. What are Hoi An lanterns made with? → Colourful silk and bamboo frames
  5. How are the skills in Bat Trang passed on? → They are handed down from generation to generation

sections.heading: 3. Speaking: Give a short presentation
sections.content:
Work in groups. Prepare a short presentation about a speciality from your region or a region you know.

Structure:

  • Introduction: Name of the speciality and where it's from
  • Description: What it looks like, how it's made
  • Significance: Why it's special, its cultural value
  • Conclusion: Why visitors should try/buy it

Sample presentation:

Today I'd like to talk about Phở, a famous Vietnamese speciality from Ha Noi. It's a noodle soup made with beef or chicken broth, rice noodles, and fresh herbs. The broth is simmered for hours with bones and spices like cinnamon and star anise. Phở is special because it represents Vietnamese cuisine and culture. If you visit Ha Noi, you should try a bowl of Phở at a local shop.

exercises.question: What is Bat Trang village famous for?
exercises.explanation: Bat Trang village is famous for pottery.

exercises.question: Ben Tre is known for _____.
exercises.explanation: Ben Tre is known for coconut candy and handicrafts made from coconut leaves.

exercises.question: Van Phuc silk village is in _____.
exercises.explanation: Van Phuc silk village is in Ha Tay, now part of Ha Noi.

exercises.question: Hoi An lanterns are made with colourful silk and _____.
exercises.explanation: Hoi An lanterns are made with colourful silk and bamboo frames.

exercises.question: The phrase 'handed down' means _____.
exercises.explanation: hand down = truyền lại từ thế hệ này sang thế hệ khác.

sub_lessons.name: Skills 2
sub_lessons.description: Kỹ năng 2 - Nghe về người giúp đỡ cộng đồng và viết đoạn văn về một người giúp đỡ cộng đồng.

sections.heading: 1. Listening: A community helper
sections.content:
Pre-listening: Who can you see in the pictures? What do they do?

Listen to a passage about a community helper and answer the questions.

Listening passage:

Mr. Nam is a garbage collector in our community. He has worked for the local environment service for 15 years. Every morning at 5 o'clock, he starts his work. He collects rubbish from different streets and takes it to the recycling centre. He always does his job carefully and happily.

People in the neighbourhood love Mr. Nam because he is very friendly and helpful. Sometimes, he helps elderly people carry heavy bins to the street. He also reminds children to sort rubbish correctly.

Mr. Nam says he is proud of his job because he helps keep the community clean and beautiful.

Comprehension questions:

  1. What does Mr. Nam do? → He is a garbage collector.
  2. How long has he worked for the local environment service? → For 15 years.
  3. What time does he start his work? → At 5 o'clock every morning.
  4. Why do people love Mr. Nam? → Because he is very friendly and helpful.
  5. Why is Mr. Nam proud of his job? → Because he helps keep the community clean and beautiful.

sections.heading: 2. Writing: A paragraph about a community helper
sections.content:
Structure for writing:

PartContent
Topic sentenceIntroduce the community helper (who, job)
BodyDescribe what he/she does, where, when, how
BodySay why he/she is important to the community
Concluding sentenceYour feeling or opinion about this helper

Sample paragraph:

My aunt Lan is a nurse at the local health centre. She has worked there for ten years. Every day, she takes care of patients, checks their temperature, and gives them medicine. She is very kind and patient with everyone. My aunt Lan is important to our community because she helps sick people get better and stay healthy. I am very proud of her.

Useful language:

  • Jobs: police officer, firefighter, garbage collector, postman, nurse, artisan, tradesperson
  • Verbs: help, protect, serve, take care of, collect, deliver, make, keep, maintain
  • Phrasal verbs: look after, look for, carry out, set up, find out, hand down
  • Linking words: First, Then, Next, Also, Moreover, In addition, Finally

exercises.question: What is Mr. Nam's job?
exercises.explanation: Mr. Nam is a garbage collector.

exercises.question: How long has Mr. Nam worked for the environment service?
exercises.explanation: He has worked for the local environment service for 15 years.

exercises.question: What time does Mr. Nam start his work?
exercises.explanation: Every morning at 5 o'clock, he starts his work.

exercises.question: Why is Mr. Nam proud of his job?
options: Because he earns a lot of money.
Because he helps keep the community clean and beautiful.
Because he has a fancy uniform.
exercises.explanation: Mr. Nam is proud because he helps keep the community clean and beautiful.

exercises.question: Write a paragraph (60-80 words) about a community helper you know. Use the structure: introduce the person, describe their work, explain why they are important, and state your feeling.
exercises.sample_answer: My neighbour Mr. Tuan is a police officer. He has worked for the local police station for 12 years. Every day, he patrols the streets and helps keep law and order in our community. He is very dedicated and always ready to help people. Mr. Tuan is important because he protects our safety. I really admire him.
exercises.explanation: Học sinh viết đoạn văn giới thiệu về người giúp đỡ cộng đồng, mô tả công việc, tầm quan trọng và cảm nghĩ.

sub_lessons.name: Looking Back
sub_lessons.description: Ôn tập từ vựng và ngữ pháp toàn bộ Unit 1: Local Community.

sections.heading: 1. Vocabulary Review
sections.content:
Community helpers: garbage collector, firefighter, police officer, nurse, postman, tradesperson, artisan

Traditional handicrafts: pottery, weaving, embroidery, wood carving, silk-making, conical hat making, incense making

Phrasal verbs: look after, look for, look forward to, turn up, turn down, get on with, get over, carry out, find out, set up, hand down, cut down on

sections.heading: 2. Grammar Review
sections.content:
Question Words + to-infinitive:

  • what to do, where to go, when to start, how to use, who to ask, which to choose
  • Không dùng: why to V
  • Dùng sau: know, tell, show, learn, decide, wonder, ask, remember, forget, find out

exercises.question: Do you know _____ to sort rubbish?
exercises.explanation: how to sort = cách phân loại

exercises.question: She didn't tell me _____ to meet, in the library or in the lab.
exercises.explanation: where to meet = gặp ở đâu

exercises.question: Could you tell me _____ to do in this situation?
exercises.explanation: what to do = làm gì

exercises.question: I wonder _____ to ask for advice: my teacher or my parents.
exercises.explanation: who to ask = hỏi ai

exercises.question: The villagers _____ their traditional weaving techniques. (Preserve / Shorten)
exercises.explanation: preserve = bảo tồn, duy trì

exercises.question: Bun cha is the _____ I like best. (speciality / fast food)
exercises.explanation: speciality = đặc sản

exercises.question: My grandparents gave the skills to my parents. (hand down)
options: My grandparents hand down the skills to my parents.
My grandparents handed down the skills to my parents.
My grandparents handing down the skills to my parents.
My grandparents will hand down the skills to my parents.
exercises.explanation: handed down (quá khứ) = đã truyền lại

exercises.question: People make these objects out of clay. What are they?
exercises.explanation: Pottery = đồ gốm, làm từ đất sét.

exercises.question: This person stops fires from burning. Who is this?
exercises.explanation: Firefighter = lính cứu hỏa

exercises.question: You should decide _____ to move to the new house.
exercises.explanation: when to move = khi nào chuyển đi

sub_lessons.name: Project
sub_lessons.description: Dự án: Tìm hiểu và giới thiệu về cộng đồng của bạn - What is good about your community?

theory.title: Project: What is good about your community?

sections.heading: Project Instructions
sections.content:
Work in groups. Interview some people about your community and present your findings.

Step 1: Prepare interview questions

  • What do you like about our community?
  • What facilities are there in our community?
  • Who are the community helpers? What do they do?
  • What traditional products or specialities does our area have?
  • What can we do to improve our community?

Step 2: Interview

  • Interview 2-3 people (neighbours, family members, local shopkeepers)
  • Take notes of their answers

Step 3: Prepare your presentation

PartContent
IntroductionName of your community, where it is
FacilitiesParks, schools, markets, hospitals, etc.
PeopleCommunity helpers, neighbours, their roles
SpecialitiesLocal food, handicrafts, traditional products
ConclusionWhy your community is a great place to live

sections.heading: Sample Project: My Community
sections.content:
What is good about my community?

I live in a small town in Ha Noi's suburb. Our community has many good things. First, there are good facilities including a park, a swimming pool, and a library. Children can play sports and read books there.

Second, the people in my community are very friendly. The police officer keeps our streets safe, and the garbage collectors keep the town clean. Our neighbours help each other and get on well with each other.

Third, my town is famous for traditional pottery. Many tourists visit our craft village to buy beautiful vases and bowls. The skills have been handed down for many generations.

I love my community because it is peaceful, clean, and friendly. Everyone knows each other and is willing to help. I am proud to live here.

exercises.question: Write a paragraph (80-100 words) about what is good about your community. Include: facilities, people (community helpers), traditional products/specialities, and your feelings.
exercises.sample_answer: I live in a suburb of Ha Noi. Our community has a big park and a modern sports centre. The police officer keeps our neighbourhood safe. The garbage collectors come every morning to keep the streets clean. My town is famous for making beautiful wooden furniture. The artisans are very skilled. They have handed down their craft for many years. I love my community because it is peaceful and the people are friendly and helpful.
exercises.explanation: Học sinh viết đoạn văn giới thiệu về cộng đồng của mình, bao gồm cơ sở vật chất, con người và đặc sản địa phương.
